title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced faces criticism for connection issues and microtransactions as Ubisoft withdraws controversial statement
summary: The remastered title has been singled out for connectivity problems and the company removed from its financial report the statement that microtransactions make games "more fun".

title: Call of Duty Black Ops 1 and 2 ports on PlayStation criticized for offering minimal improvements and high prices
summary: Analysts and players agree that the PS4 and PS5 releases barely include notable technical improvements over the originals.

title: Summer Games Done Quick 2026 raises $2.4 million and cancels SNK-sponsored stream amid criticism over its relationship with Saudi Arabia
summary: The speedrunning charity event apologized for the sponsorship and canceled it live after community complaints about human rights.

title: Sony criticized for its push toward digital amid complaints from consumers and physical format advocacy groups
summary: The company faces lawsuits and criticism for removing physical discs, but assures that God of War Laufey will be available in this format.

title: Actor Sam Neill, known for his role as Alan Grant in Jurassic Park, dies at 78
summary: Media around the world confirmed the death of the New Zealand actor, remembered for his roles in Jurassic Park and other films.

title: The Outer Worlds 2 director denies false information about mass layoffs at Xbox
summary: Brandon Adler insists that Obsidian maintains its creative essence despite rumors of cuts at the company.

title: Palworld reaches new player peak after launch of version 1.0 on Steam
summary: The survival game recorded nearly 900,000 concurrent players and surpassed titles like Dota 2 in popularity.

title: Riot Games announces League of Legends Classic mode with release date and community-voted patches
summary: The nostalgic mode will allow players to experience the early versions of the game with updates decided by voting.

title: Warframe creative director calls Destiny 2's end tragic and criticizes corporate pressure in the industry
summary: The Digital Extremes developer lamented the disappearance of Bungie's game and pointed out that executives are an existential threat.

title: Steam reaches record revenue of $11.1 billion in the first half of 2026
summary: Valve's platform recorded its best half-year driven by high game prices and the trend toward purchasing expensive titles.

title: Following Xbox layoffs, Bethesda employees protest while ZeniMax assures The Elder Scrolls Online will continue
summary: The staff reduction affected the parent studio, which confirmed that the online game will remain active despite having reduced its size to that of ten years ago.

title: Christopher Nolan says young people immediately reject AI-generated content
summary: The director praised the success of Backrooms and stated that new generations are very critical of so-called 'AI slop'.

title: Wizards of the Coast launches controversial Magic Secret Lair that sparks criticism for its representation of Tolkien's work
summary: The collection includes pumpkin art that has been considered disrespectful to The Lord of the Rings by fans.

title: Konami will add Super Bomberman: Panic Bomber W as a free update to the Super Bomberman Collection
summary: On August 20, the classic title will be included in the compilation, according to the company's announcement.

title: Octopath Traveler 1 and 2 will come to Switch 2 with improved graphics and performance
summary: Square Enix confirmed that both games will receive enhanced versions for Nintendo's new console.

title: Honkai Star Rail version 4.4 release time revealed for each time zone
summary: Players can now check the exact time the new update for HoYoverse's RPG will be available.

title: TennoCon 2026 reveals all major news for Warframe and Soulframe
summary: Digital Extremes' annual event showcased upcoming updates and content for both titles.

title: EA removes microtransactions from EA Sports College Football 27 after negative fan reaction
summary: The decision was made after players harshly criticized the payment system in the college sports game.

title: Hanwha Life Esports crowned champion of the 2026 League of Legends Mid-Season Invitational
summary: The Korean team won the international tournament after an exciting best-of-five series.

title: Minecraft adds the ability to sit down 17 years after launch
summary: The update allows players to sit on stairs and slabs, a highly requested feature.
